property.name: showCompleted
property.label: Show Completed Items
property.description: When checked, includes completed (inactive) work items in the Gantt chart.

property.name: initialViewMode
property.label: Initial View Mode
property.description: The default view mode when the chart loads.

LightningComponentBundle.description: Interactive Gantt chart powered by Frappe Gantt. Shows work items with progress bars, stage color-coding by workflow phase, view mode controls, and click-to-navigate.
